message:
feat(web): enhance region selection explanation in create-vps (i0q7)

Add prominent "Why region matters" card with geographic examples and latency explanation.
Enhanced SimplerGuide step 3 with expanded region options (USA/Europe/Asia-Pacific).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -317,6 +317,33 @@ export default function CreateVPSPage() { + {/* Region selection tip - prominent placement */} +
+

💡 Why region matters

+

+ Closer servers = faster response times. When you type, commands reach your VPS faster. + When AI generates code, it appears on your screen faster. +

+
+
+ 🇺🇸 USA:{" "} + Pick US-West (California) or US-East (Virginia) +
+
+ 🇪🇺 Europe:{" "} + Pick Germany, France, or Finland +
+
+ 🌏 Asia-Pacific:{" "} + Pick Singapore or Australia +
+
+ 🤷 Unsure?{" "} + Any region works fine—pick one! +
+
+
+ {/* Provider-specific guides */}

Need help with your provider?

@@ -369,11 +396,15 @@ export default function CreateVPSPage() { - Pick a data center close to you for faster speeds: + Pick a data center close to you for faster speeds. The closer the server, + the faster your typing appears and AI responses stream back. This matters + because you'll be interacting with your VPS constantly.
    -
  • USA: Choose US-West or US-East
    • -
  • Europe: Choose Germany (FSN) or Finland (HEL)
    • -
  • If unsure, any location works fine!
    • +
  • USA West Coast: Pick US-West, Los Angeles, or Seattle
    • +
  • USA East Coast: Pick US-East, Virginia, or New York
    • +
  • Europe: Pick Germany (Nuremberg/Frankfurt), France, or Finland
    • +
  • Asia-Pacific: Pick Singapore, Sydney, or Tokyo
    • +
  • If unsure: Just pick one! Any region works, and the difference is small.
